stanislavski.core: Emotional truth through internal experience. Actor lives the character's circumstances.
stanislavski.prompt_language: motivated from inner emotional truth, specific objective driving every beat, lived-in naturalism

meisner.core: Living truthfully under imaginary circumstances. Moment-to-moment instinctive response to partner.
meisner.prompt_language: reactive and spontaneous, listening deeply, responding to the moment not the script, impulse-driven

practical_aesthetics.core: Mamet / Macy school. Literal action, simple want, text as written. Anti-psychological.
practical_aesthetics.prompt_language: precise action verb driving delivery, unadorned truth, text delivered as written, zero indication

method.core: Lee Strasberg. Extreme psychological immersion. Substitution, sense memory, emotional recall.
method.prompt_language: deeply inhabited, sense-memory grounded, raw emotional access, total psychological immersion

physical_theatre.core: Lecoq / Viewpoints. Body first. Space, time, shape, gesture, repetition.
physical_theatre.prompt_language: body-led characterization, physicality precise and deliberate, spatial geometry intentional

direction_language.urgency: driven, pressed, no time to waste, body leaning forward, words clipped
direction_language.grief: held, constricted throat, pauses involuntary, eyes wet but not crying, jaw tight
direction_language.menace: stillness carrying threat, economy of movement, voice low and even, held eye contact
direction_language.joy: open body, easy breath, face leading, gesture released not controlled
direction_language.fear: contracted, quick glances, shallow breath, micro-flinch on sudden sound
direction_language.resolve: settled, jaw set, gaze steady, breath deepens before speaking, stillness with weight
direction_language.confusion: brief disconnection, processing visible in eyes, speech slightly hesitant
direction_language.desire: extended contact, breath slightly elevated, language economical, eyes stay

dialogue_delivery.naturalistic: motivated breath, overlapping rhythms, imperfect starts, listening visible
dialogue_delivery.heightened: controlled, rhythmic, text precisely placed, elevated register, articulate
dialogue_delivery.clipped_noir: terse, pauses weighted, subtext dense, every word doing double duty
dialogue_delivery.comedic_timing: beat before punchline, commitment to premise, reaction held, never indicate
